evals.prompt: Run a dependency audit on pkg/ — check the coupling and dependency health, especially dead dependencies and circular imports.
evals.expected_output: The audit catches the two planted dependency problems in pkg/: (D6) a circular dependency between pkg/src/a.ts and pkg/src/b.ts, which import each other (a imports b's formatB, b imports a's NAME_A); and (D3) a dead dependency — `left-pad` is declared in pkg/package.json but imported by no file in the package (lodash, by contrast, is used in index.ts). The cycle is cited with the two files, and left-pad is named as unused. The audit writes its report to zuvo/audits/ and modifies no source file.
assertions: The audit records a D6 circular-dependency finding between pkg/src/a.ts and pkg/src/b.ts — the two modules import each other (a imports b, b imports a) — citing the files in the cycle.
The audit records a D3 dead/unused-dependency finding for `left-pad`, declared in pkg/package.json but imported by no file in the package (while lodash is correctly recognized as used in index.ts).
The audit writes a dependency-audit report to zuvo/audits/ recording the circular-dependency and dead-dependency findings, and it modifies no source file.

evals.prompt: Run a dependency audit on pkg/ and tell me the coupling and dependency health.
evals.expected_output: The audit shows discipline, not noise: it does NOT report a circular dependency (the imports form a clean acyclic chain a → b → c, no module imports one that imports it back), and it does NOT report a dead dependency (the sole declared dependency, lodash, is imported and used in pkg/src/c.ts). It records a healthy coupling/dependency result and writes its report to zuvo/audits/, modifying no source file — no fabricated cycle or phantom unused-dependency finding.
assertions: The audit records no circular-dependency finding against pkg/ — the imports form an acyclic chain (a → b → c, no back-edge), recognized as a clean DAG.
The audit records no dead/unused-dependency finding against pkg/package.json — the only declared dependency, lodash, is imported and used in pkg/src/c.ts.
The audit writes a dependency-audit report to zuvo/audits/ recording a healthy coupling/dependency result, and it modifies no source file.
